skill.name: project-map-builder
skill.description: 生成或更新用户指定文件夹的 PROJECT_MAP.md。适用于用户要求目录地图/项目地图/代码仓概览/文件夹级说明/更新已有 PROJECT_MAP.md 的场景。必须先询问要扫描的文件夹范围，禁止默认全仓库扫描；支持单目录或多目录（合并或分别生成）。
skill.summary: Generates or updates PROJECT_MAP.md documentation for specified directories with incremental update support.
skill.author: yunshu0909

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged external_commands at SKILL.md:54, but this is a false positive. The file is documentation-only describing suggested workflows using standard tools like ripgrep. No actual command execution, network access, or credential handling exists. Safe for publication.

content.value_statement: Navigate complex codebases with automatically generated directory documentation. This skill creates and maintains PROJECT_MAP.md files that provide high-signal overviews of your project structure.
actual_capabilities: Generates PROJECT_MAP.md for single or multiple directories
Performs incremental updates to existing documentation
Identifies entry points, key files, and module relationships
Supports merged or separate outputs for multi-directory scans
Asks clarifying questions before large scope scans
Maintains consistent output language matching user preference
limitations: Requires user to specify directory scope before scanning
Cannot scan entire repositories without explicit user confirmation
Only reads key files to avoid excessive context usage
Updates are incremental and preserve existing structure

use_cases.title: Onboard to Legacy Codebase
use_cases.description: Generate a comprehensive directory map for unfamiliar projects to quickly understand file organization and key modules.

use_cases.title: Document Multi-Service Architecture
use_cases.description: Create separate or merged documentation for microservices, libraries, and tooling directories.

use_cases.title: Maintain Project Documentation
use_cases.description: Incrementally update existing PROJECT_MAP.md when adding new features or refactoring directories.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Single Directory Map
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a PROJECT_MAP.md for the src directory. Show me the file structure and key modules.

prompt_templates.title: Multi-Directory Merged Output
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a merged PROJECT_MAP.md covering both packages/core and packages/utils. I want one combined document at the project root.

prompt_templates.title: Incremental Update After Refactor
prompt_templates.prompt: Update the existing PROJECT_MAP.md to reflect the recent changes in the api/ directory. Add an update section with today's date.

prompt_templates.title: Deep Dive with Entry Point Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Build a PROJECT_MAP.md for the frontend/app folder. Identify the main entry point, UI components, state management, and API integration layers.

output_examples.output: Creates a structured markdown file with project overview, directory hierarchy, key file descriptions, and module relationships. Includes sections for entry points, configuration keys, and any uncertain areas marked as assumptions.

output_examples.input: Update existing PROJECT_MAP.md after adding new service
output_examples.output: Preserves existing structure while adding new directory section. Appends an Update section with date, scope, and summary of changes like added files or reorganized folders.

best_practices: Always specify the exact directory scope before scanning to avoid unnecessary context usage
Review generated PROJECT_MAP.md for accuracy and update assumptions as you learn more
Use incremental updates rather than full regenerations to preserve documentation history
anti_patterns: Requesting full repository scans without narrowing scope first
Deleting PROJECT_MAP.md instead of updating it when codebase changes
Ignoring uncertain areas marked in the generated documentation

faq.question: What directories should I specify for the best results?
faq.answer: Focus on source code directories like src/, app/, or packages/. Exclude generated files, node_modules, and build artifacts.

faq.question: Can this skill scan multiple directories at once?
faq.answer: Yes. You can specify multiple directories and choose whether to merge them into one document or generate separate PROJECT_MAP.md files for each.

faq.question: How does incremental update work?
faq.answer: The skill reads your existing PROJECT_MAP.md, re-scans only the directories you specify, and updates only the affected sections while preserving the rest.

faq.question: What if the documentation has errors or assumptions?
faq.answer: Uncertain areas are explicitly marked. You can ask the skill to investigate specific files and update the documentation with verified information.

faq.question: Where is the PROJECT_MAP.md file created?
faq.answer: For single directories, it is created at that directory root. For merged multi-directory output, it goes at the project root.

faq.question: Does this skill read all files in the directory?
faq.answer: No. It uses fast file listing and only reads key files like entry points, configs, and module definitions to avoid excessive context usage.
